package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_lazy_loading_eager_load_optional_config: Layer: Lazy loading. Flag optional configuration or metadata loaded at startup before any feature uses it.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule555PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario555Positive(records []Rule555PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
